creator: billf@chc-chimes.com
text:
I tried updating the news/nn port as you asked but it fails in the install
process (it wants the user to hardcode a domain into a header file).

Would you or someone else like to either write some hack to make this
work?

thanks,

- bill fumerola - billf@chc-chimes.com - BF1560 - computer horizons corp -
